201.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was visited by Jibril (peace be upon him) who said: 'Allah, Blessed and Exalted, commands you to make your nation recite the Quran on seven modes of recitation. Whichever mode they recite on, they have done correctly.'
201.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ dikunjungi Jibril (alaihi salam) yang berkata: 'Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala memerintahkanmu untuk membuat umatmu membaca Al-Quran dengan tujuh huruf. Huruf mana pun yang mereka baca, mereka telah benar.'

202.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that Jibril came to the Prophet ﷺ at the waterways of Banu Ghifar and said: 'Allah commands you to make your nation recite the Quran on one mode.' The Prophet said: 'I ask Allah for His pardon and forgiveness.' The account continued until Allah commanded seven modes of recitation.
202.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Jibril datang kepada Nabi ﷺ di dekat kolam Banu Ghifar dan berkata: 'Allah memerintahkanmu untuk membuat umatmu membaca Al-Quran dengan satu huruf.' Nabi bersabda: 'Aku memohon maaf dan ampunan Allah.' Kisahnya berlanjut sampai Allah memerintahkan tujuh huruf.

203.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Two men traced their lineage during the time of Musa (peace be upon him). One said: I am so-and-so son of so-and-so, until he counted nine. Then he said to the other: And who are you, motherless one? He said: I am so-and-so son of so-and-so, son of Islam.'
203.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dua orang menelusuri nasab mereka pada masa Musa (alaihi salam). Salah satu berkata: Aku adalah si fulan putra si fulan, hingga ia menghitung sembilan. Lalu ia berkata kepada yang lain: Dan kamu siapa, tidak punya ibu? Ia berkata: Aku adalah si fulan putra si fulan, putra Islam.'

204.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Recite.' They recited and he said: 'Well done.' Something fell in Ubayy's heart from doubt, as it had during the days of ignorance. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw what had overcome him, he struck his chest and Ubayy broke into a sweat.
204.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Baca.' Mereka membaca dan beliau bersabda: 'Bagus.' Sesuatu jatuh ke hati Ubayy berupa keraguan sebagaimana pada hari-hari jahiliyah. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ melihat apa yang menimpanya, beliau menepuk dadanya dan Ubayy bersimbah keringat.

205.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that he, his father, and Abu Talhah sat together, ate meat and bread, then called for water to perform ablution. They said: 'Why are you performing ablution?' He said: 'For this food we ate.' They said: 'Do you perform ablution for things that are lawful?'
205.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia, ayahnya, dan Abu Talhah duduk bersama, makan daging dan roti, kemudian meminta air untuk wudhu. Mereka berkata: 'Mengapa kamu berwudhu?' Ia berkata: 'Untuk makanan yang kami makan ini.' Mereka berkata: 'Apakah kamu berwudhu untuk hal-hal yang halal?'

206.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Zirr asked me about the two Mu'awwidhatain. I asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about them and was told of them, so the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us to recite them.'
206.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Zirr bertanya kepadaku tentang dua Muawwidzatain. Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang keduanya dan diberitahu, sehingga Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami untuk membacanya.'

207.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said regarding the two Mu'awwidhatain: 'We asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about them and he told us of them.'
207.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata tentang dua Muawwidzatain: 'Kami bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang keduanya dan beliau memberitahu kami.'

208.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that Ibn Masud used to erase the Mu'awwidhatain from his copy of the Quran. He did not consider them part of the Quran because he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ use them as incantations for al-Hasan and al-Husayn.
208.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Ibn Masud biasa menghapus Muawwidzatain dari salinan Al-Qurannya. Ia tidak menganggap keduanya bagian dari Al-Quran karena ia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menggunakannya sebagai ruqyah untuk Hasan dan Husain.

209.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer of a man in congregation exceeds his prayer alone by twenty-seven degrees.'
209.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat seseorang secara berjamaah melebihi shalatnya sendirian dengan dua puluh tujuh derajat.'

210.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer in congregation is twenty-five times better than the prayer of one of you alone.'
210.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat berjamaah dua puluh lima kali lebih baik dari shalat salah seorang dari kalian sendirian.'

211.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer of a man in congregation exceeds his prayer alone by twenty-five or twenty-seven degrees.'
211.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat seseorang berjamaah melebihi shalatnya sendirian dengan dua puluh lima atau dua puluh tujuh derajat.'

212.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily the prayer of the man in congregation exceeds his prayer at home or in the market by twenty-five degrees.'
212.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya shalat seseorang berjamaah melebihi shalatnya di rumah atau di pasar dengan dua puluh lima derajat.'

213.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer in congregation exceeds the prayer of a man alone by twenty-five degrees.'
213.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat berjamaah melebihi shalat seseorang sendirian dengan dua puluh lima derajat.'

214.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer of a man in congregation exceeds his prayer alone by twenty-seven degrees, and a man's prayer with one other exceeds his prayer alone, and as the number increases it is more beloved to Allah, the Mighty and Majestic.'
214.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat seseorang berjamaah melebihi shalatnya sendirian dengan dua puluh tujuh derajat, dan shalat seseorang dengan satu orang lain melebihi shalatnya sendirian, dan semakin banyak jumlahnya semakin dicintai Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung.'

215.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer in congregation is twenty-five times better than the prayer of one of you alone, for when one performs ablution perfectly, then goes to the mosque with no aim except prayer — with every step he takes, Allah raises him a degree and removes from him a sin. When he prays, the angels pray for him as long as he remains in his place of prayer.'
215.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat berjamaah dua puluh lima kali lebih baik dari shalat salah seorang dari kalian sendirian, karena ketika seseorang berwudhu dengan sempurna, kemudian pergi ke masjid tidak dengan tujuan lain kecuali shalat — dengan setiap langkah yang ia ambil, Allah mengangkat derajatnya dan menghapus darinya satu dosa. Ketika ia shalat, para malaikat mendoakannya selama ia berada di tempat shalatnya.'

216.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer in congregation exceeds the prayer of a man alone by twenty-seven degrees, and if he goes further, praying in the mosque with others, it increases further.'
216.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat berjamaah melebihi shalat seseorang sendirian dengan dua puluh tujuh derajat, dan jika ia melangkah lebih jauh, shalat di masjid bersama orang lain, maka bertambah lebih banyak.'

217.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Abu al-Mundhir, do you know which verse in the Book of Allah is greatest?' He said: 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He repeated the question. He said: 'Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep.' He struck him on the chest and said: 'May knowledge delight you, O Abu al-Mundhir.'
217.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Abu al-Mundzir, tahukah kamu ayat mana dalam Kitab Allah yang paling agung?' Ia berkata: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih tahu.' Beliau mengulangi pertanyaan. Ia berkata: 'Allah — tidak ada tuhan selain Dia, Yang Maha Hidup, Yang Mengurus makhluk-Nya. Tidak ada kantuk yang menguasai-Nya, tidak pula tidur.' Beliau menepuk dadanya dan bersabda: 'Semoga ilmu menyenangkanmu, wahai Abu al-Mundzir.'

218.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked him: 'Do you know which verse in the Book of Allah is greatest?' He replied: 'Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer.' He said: 'Rejoice in this knowledge, O Abu al-Mundhir.'
218.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya kepadanya: 'Tahukah kamu ayat mana dalam Kitab Allah yang paling agung?' Ia menjawab: 'Allah — tidak ada tuhan selain Dia, Yang Maha Hidup, Yang Mengurus.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bergembiralah dengan ilmu ini, wahai Abu al-Mundzir.'

219.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Congratulations on your knowledge, O Abu al-Mundhir.'
219.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Selamat atas ilmumu, wahai Abu al-Mundzir.'

220.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ asked him: 'Which verse in the Book of Allah is greatest?' He replied: 'Ayat al-Kursi.' He struck him on the chest and said: 'May knowledge delight you, O Abu al-Mundhir.'
220.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepadanya: 'Ayat mana dalam Kitab Allah yang paling agung?' Ia menjawab: 'Ayat al-Kursi.' Beliau menepuk dadanya dan bersabda: 'Semoga ilmu menyenangkanmu, wahai Abu al-Mundzir.'

221.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Abu al-Mundhir, which verse in the Book of Allah that you have memorized is greatest?' He said: 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He repeated it. He said: 'Ayat al-Kursi.' He said: 'Rejoice in your knowledge, O Abu al-Mundhir, by the One in whose hand is my soul, it has a tongue and two lips that glorify the Sovereign near the foot of the Throne.'
221.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Abu al-Mundzir, ayat mana dalam Kitab Allah yang kamu hafal yang paling agung?' Ia berkata: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih tahu.' Beliau mengulanginya. Ia berkata: 'Ayat al-Kursi.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bergembiralah dengan ilmumu, wahai Abu al-Mundzir, demi Zat yang jiwaku ada di tangan-Nya, ia memiliki lidah dan dua bibir yang bertasbih kepada Raja di dekat kaki Arsy.'

222.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer of a man with another man is better than his prayer alone, and his prayer with two others is better than with one, and the greater the number, the more beloved to Allah, the Mighty and Majestic.'
222.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat seseorang bersama orang lain lebih baik dari shalatnya sendirian, dan shalatnya bersama dua orang lebih baik dari bersama satu, dan semakin banyak jumlahnya, semakin dicintai Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung.'

223.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer of a man in congregation exceeds his prayer alone by twenty-seven degrees.'
223.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat seseorang berjamaah melebihi shalatnya sendirian dengan dua puluh tujuh derajat.'

224.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'I am the imam of the prophets. I was given five things that were not given to any prophet before me: I was sent to all of humanity, red and black; I was made victorious through fear at a distance of a month's journey; the earth was made a mosque for me; the spoils of war were made lawful for me; and I was given the right of intercession.'
224.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku adalah imam para nabi. Aku diberi lima hal yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi mana pun sebelumku: Aku diutus kepada seluruh umat manusia, merah dan hitam; aku dimenangkan melalui rasa takut pada jarak satu bulan perjalanan; bumi dijadikan masjid bagiku; ghanimah dihalalkan bagiku; dan aku diberi hak syafaat.'

225.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given what no prophet before me was given.' We said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is that?' He said: 'I was aided by fear cast into the hearts of my enemy at the distance of a month's journey.'
225.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi apa yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi manapun sebelumku.' Kami berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apa itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku dibantu dengan rasa takut yang ditanamkan ke dalam hati musuhku pada jarak satu bulan perjalanan.'

226.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given five things that no prophet before me was given: I was aided by terror at a month's distance; the earth was made a mosque and a means of purification for me; the spoils of war were made lawful for me; I was given the right of intercession; and I was sent to all of humanity.'
226.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi lima hal yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi manapun sebelumku: Aku dibantu dengan rasa takut pada jarak satu bulan; bumi dijadikan masjid dan alat bersuci bagiku; ghanimah dihalalkan bagiku; aku diberi hak syafaat; dan aku diutus kepada seluruh umat manusia.'

227.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was sent before the Hour — as a warner — to all of humanity.'
227.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diutus sebelum Hari Kiamat — sebagai pemberi peringatan — kepada seluruh umat manusia.'

228.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Jibreel recited the Quran to me in one reading. I said: O Jibreel, my nation cannot bear this. He continued to add until we reached seven modes of recitation.'
228.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril membacakan Al-Quran kepadaku dengan satu kali. Aku berkata: Wahai Jibril, umatku tidak mampu menanggung ini. Ia terus menambah hingga kami mencapai tujuh huruf.'

229.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Jibril presented the Quran to me on one reading, and I asked him to add more. He kept adding until we reached seven modes.'
229.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril membacakan Al-Quran kepadaku dengan satu bacaan, dan aku memintanya untuk menambah. Ia terus menambah hingga kami mencapai tujuh huruf.'

230.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The Quran was revealed in seven modes. Each mode is sufficient and adequate. So do not dispute over the Quran, for disputing over it is disbelief.'
230.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Al-Quran diturunkan dalam tujuh huruf. Setiap huruf cukup dan memadai. Jadi jangan berselisih tentang Al-Quran, karena berselisih tentangnya adalah kekufuran.'

231.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The Quran was revealed in seven modes. Do not dispute about it — disputing about the Book of Allah is disbelief.'
231.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Al-Quran diturunkan dalam tujuh huruf. Jangan berselisih tentangnya — berselisih tentang Kitab Allah adalah kekufuran.'

232.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily the Quran was revealed in seven modes. Each mode is a mercy and healing. So recite as it is easy for you.'
232.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Al-Quran diturunkan dalam tujuh huruf. Setiap huruf adalah rahmat dan penyembuhan. Maka bacalah sesuai yang mudah bagimu.'

233.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Quran was presented to me on seven modes. I asked for ease for my nation. So recite as it is easy for you.'
233.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Al-Quran dibacakan kepadaku dengan tujuh huruf. Aku memohon kemudahan bagi umatku. Maka bacalah sesuai yang mudah bagimu.'

234.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Jibril met me and said: O Muhammad, Allah commands you to recite the Quran in one mode. I said: I ask Allah for His pardon and forgiveness. Then Mika'il was with him and said: Ask for more. So I kept asking until we reached seven modes.'
234.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril menemuiku dan berkata: Wahai Muhammad, Allah memerintahkanmu untuk membaca Al-Quran dengan satu huruf. Aku berkata: Aku memohon maaf dan ampunan Allah. Kemudian Mikail bersamanya dan berkata: Minta tambah. Jadi aku terus meminta sampai kami mencapai tujuh huruf.'

235.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah sent me with this Quran in seven modes. I took it and asked for more, and He gave me more, until I reached the seventh, and He said: O Muhammad, every mode that you have recited is sufficient.'
235.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah mengirimku dengan Al-Quran ini dalam tujuh huruf. Aku mengambilnya dan meminta lebih, dan Dia memberiku lebih, sampai aku mencapai yang ketujuh, dan Dia berfirman: Wahai Muhammad, setiap huruf yang telah kamu baca sudah cukup.'

236.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Jibril came to me and said: Recite the Quran on one mode. Mika'il said: Ask for more. I kept asking until we reached seven modes. All of them are in the preserved original.'
236.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril datang kepadaku dan berkata: Bacalah Al-Quran dengan satu huruf. Mikail berkata: Minta tambah. Aku terus meminta sampai kami mencapai tujuh huruf. Semuanya ada dalam aslinya yang terjaga.'

237.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I met the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: O Messenger of Allah, I was put to trial last night by something difficult.' He asked: 'What was it?' He said: 'I did not stop reciting the Quran.' He said: 'That is the Shaytan's touch. Recite when things are difficult for you, and use your hand.'
237.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku menemui Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: Ya Rasulullah, malam ini aku diuji dengan sesuatu yang sulit.' Beliau bertanya: 'Apa itu?' Ia berkata: 'Aku terus membaca Al-Quran tanpa henti.' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah sentuhan setan. Bacalah ketika hal-hal sulit bagimu, dan gunakan tanganmu.'

238.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ presented the Quran to Jibril each year during Ramadan, and in the year he died, he presented it twice.
238.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ membacakan Al-Quran kepada Jibril setiap tahun selama Ramadan, dan pada tahun wafatnya, beliau membacakannya dua kali.

239.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to present the Quran to Jibril once a year, and in the year of his death he presented it twice. Jibril told him: 'I think that is a sign of your imminent death.'
239.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membacakan Al-Quran kepada Jibril sekali setahun, dan pada tahun kematiannya beliau membacakannya dua kali. Jibril berkata kepadanya: 'Aku kira itu merupakan pertanda kematianmu yang segera.'

240.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'My father and I are free of the polytheists.' He was asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, did your father practice idolatry?' He said: 'My Lord made a covenant with me regarding my father, just as He made a covenant with Ibrahim regarding his father.'
240.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ayahku dan aku berlepas diri dari para musyrik.' Ia ditanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah ayahmu menyembah berhala?' Beliau bersabda: 'Rabb-ku membuat perjanjian denganku tentang ayahku, sebagaimana Dia membuat perjanjian dengan Ibrahim tentang ayahnya.'

241.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'My example among the prophets is like a man who built a house beautifully and completely, except for one brick in a corner. People would circle the building in admiration and say: If only this brick were placed. I am that brick, and I am the Seal of the Prophets.'
241.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaanku di antara para nabi seperti seorang pria yang membangun sebuah rumah dengan indah dan sempurna, kecuali satu bata di sudutnya. Orang-orang mengelilingi bangunan itu dengan kagum dan berkata: Seandainya bata ini diletakkan. Akulah bata itu, dan aku adalah Penutup Para Nabi.'

242.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'My example among the prophets is like a man who built a house and made it excellent and complete, except he left a space for one brick. People came and admired it, saying: If only this brick were placed! I am that brick — I am the last of the prophets.'
242.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaanku di antara para nabi seperti seorang pria yang membangun sebuah rumah dan membuatnya sempurna, kecuali ia meninggalkan ruang untuk satu bata. Orang-orang datang dan mengaguminya, berkata: Seandainya bata ini diletakkan! Akulah bata itu — aku adalah nabi terakhir.'

243.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'My example and the example of the prophets is like a man who built a house excellently, except for the place of one brick. People would circle it in admiration but say: If only this one brick were placed! I am that missing brick.'
243.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaanku dan perumpamaan para nabi seperti seorang pria yang membangun sebuah rumah dengan sangat baik, kecuali tempat satu bata. Orang-orang mengelilinginya dengan kagum tetapi berkata: Seandainya satu bata ini diletakkan! Akulah bata yang hilang itu.'

244.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given the good news of being admitted into Paradise and I saw in a vision that I passed by a tree, large and beautiful. The angels said to me: From this tree.' I was also given the last two verses of Al-Baqarah from a treasure beneath the Throne.',
244.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi kabar gembira tentang masuk Surga dan aku melihat dalam mimpi bahwa aku melewati sebuah pohon, besar dan indah. Para malaikat berkata kepadaku: Dari pohon ini.' Aku juga diberi dua ayat terakhir Al-Baqarah dari perbendaharaan di bawah Arsy.'

245.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given the two concluding verses of Surah Al-Baqarah from a treasure beneath the Throne that was not given to any prophet before me.'
245.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi dua ayat penutup Surah Al-Baqarah dari perbendaharaan di bawah Arsy yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi manapun sebelumku.'

246.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I and the Hour are like these two — and he indicated with his index and middle fingers together.'
246.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku dan Hari Kiamat seperti dua ini — dan beliau mengisyaratkan dengan jari telunjuk dan jari tengah bersama.'

247.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the prophets, their spokesman, and the owner of their intercession — without pride.'
247.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam para nabi, juru bicara mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka — tanpa kesombongan.'

248.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the prophets and their spokesman — without pride.'
248.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam para nabi dan juru bicara mereka — tanpa kesombongan.'

249.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the people, their spokesman, and the owner of their intercession, without pride.'
249.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam manusia, juru bicara mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka, tanpa kesombongan.'

250.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ ordered that a minbar be made for him. When it was made and he moved to it from the palm trunk, the trunk cried out like a child. The Prophet ﷺ descended and embraced it and it became quiet.
250.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan dibuatkan mimbar untuknya. Ketika dibuat dan beliau pindah ke sana dari batang pohon kurma, batang itu menangis seperti seorang anak. Nabi ﷺ turun dan memeluknya sehingga ia tenang.
